hold_reason: Timestamp-safe provider access and coverage for BTC/ETH exchange inflow/outflow/netflow could not be confirmed without API credentials/licensing or a dedicated connector; current qfa also lacks an on-chain flow evaluator with crypto spot/perp maker/taker costs and perp funding accounting.
unblock_condition: Provide licensed/API access or an approved connector for point-in-time BTC and ETH exchange inflow/outflow/netflow metrics from Glassnode, CryptoQuant, Coin Metrics, Nansen, or equivalent, including publication/availability lag and exchange-label revision policy; add qfa evaluator support for crypto spot/perp execution costs and perp funding if perps are traded.

spot.notes: Conservative generic centralized-exchange spot fee assumption for future BTC/ETH implementation; not applied because performance was not run.

perp_optional_later.notes: Perp fee/funding model documented for optional later implementation only.

minimum_needed_before_performance: Credentialed or licensed provider connector for BTC and ETH exchange inflow, outflow, netflow and/or exchange balance-change metrics with exact metric timestamps and documented publication/availability lag.
Provider documentation or archived PIT snapshots proving exchange address labels and entity clustering are point-in-time safe or conservatively lagged despite revisions.
Coverage diagnostics for BTC and ETH across spot/perp tradable history, missingness, provider outages, and provider metric definition changes.
Crypto evaluator that joins flow observations to BTC/ETH spot/perp prices only after the conservative lag, applies maker/taker fill mix and slippage, and accounts for funding if perps are used.
Control framework versus BTC/ETH momentum, reversal, volatility/drawdown, stablecoin-liquidity, macro/risk beta, shifted-flow labels and inverted-flow direction.

source_options_checked.evidence: Searches found qfa crypto asset-class plumbing and Alpaca crypto bars, but no Glassnode/CryptoQuant/Coin Metrics/Nansen connector, exchange-label revision handling, on-chain netflow schema, or spot/perp maker-taker/funding evaluator for this signal.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Cannot infer exchange netflows from OHLCV or fixtures under AR-144 constraints.

source_options_checked.evidence: Lightweight endpoint checks for metrics metadata and BTC exchange-net-volume candidate returned HTTP 401 Authorization Required; no API key was used and no raw payloads were retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Plausible route only after credentials and documentation for publication lag and label/entity revision/PIT policy.

source_options_checked.evidence: Lightweight exchange-flow endpoint check returned HTTP 401 unauthorized / bearer token missing; no token was used and no raw payloads were retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Plausible route only after licensed access and timestamp/label revision documentation.

source_options_checked.evidence: Catalog endpoint returned HTTP 200, but BTC exchange-flow metric request returned HTTP 403: requested FlowInExInclUSD/FlowOutExInclUSD unavailable with supplied credentials.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Plausible via paid/API access if exchange-flow metrics and definitions include timestamp-safe availability and revision policy.

source_options_checked.evidence: API root check returned HTTP 401 / API key required; no key was used and no raw data retained.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Plausible only if licensed BTC/ETH exchange-flow metrics include PIT label/revision treatment and publication lag.

source_options_checked.evidence: No vendor credentials, dumps, CSVs, caches, or raw data were used.
source_options_checked.timestamp_safety_notes: Must satisfy real provider data, timestamp-safety, lag, coverage, and redistribution constraints before any performance test.
